HGSS.328.0000:
Welcome to Saffron City, home of the
Magnet Train!\f
...That’s what I’d normally say, but
the Magnet Train isn’t running now.\f
It’s not getting any electricity
because there’s something wrong\r
with the Power Plant.
HGSS.328.0001:
The Magnet Train is the most famous
thing about Saffron.
